default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content performance, CMS access, and content strategy alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is improving with 6,000+ impressions from 11 indexed articles over 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [GrowthX to track LLM prompts to improve Abnormal's visibility in AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [CMS access issues persist; team submitting IT tickets to resolve](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Content ideation pipeline needs replenishment in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [17 articles published, 11 indexed and performing well](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [6,000+ impressions over past 3 months across Abnormal Security and Abnormal AI sites](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Average position trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Glossary pages showing improvement post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [2 articles (Email Header, Human Center of Security) awaiting indexing](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### CMS Access Challenges

  - [Jason and Sydney experiencing difficulties accessing Craft CMS through Okta](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Emily provided step-by-step guide for blog creation](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Team submitting IT tickets to resolve access issues](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Exploring potential for API/automation for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### LLM Tracking Initiative

  - [GrowthX implementing tracking for awareness-focused prompts](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Aim to increase Abnormal's presence in AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Example: "AI-powered social engineering" prompt currently doesn't mention Abnormal](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Traffic from ChatGPT expected to convert well; goal is to amplify this](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### Abnormal's Content Strategy Overview

  - [Multiple content streams: demand gen, SME insights, analytics-driven, AI focus, analyst reports](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Content types include blog posts, videos, white papers, threat intel, product-related assets](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Team structure: Emily (awareness), Callie (threat intel), new hires for product and R\&D content](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Developing overarching content narrative structure (AI-first, SEG replacement, company culture)](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Content Production Collaboration

  - [GrowthX focusing on awareness-level content](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [25 new articles planned for upload this week](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [20 approved article ideas remaining in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Need for idea replenishment in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to submit IT ticket for Craft CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Sydney to upload 25 new articles to CMS once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Emily to review content ideas with Jade and Abdallah](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement LLM tracking and create dashboard for Abnormal](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Team to explore potential for API/automation in content publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Revisit additional support areas in 1-2 weeks after stabilizing production cadence](https://fathom.video/share/MRmAsdKbXRBrHrbkWdgEk5fo92CyswKx?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

action_items.description: Sync w/ Jade + Abdallah to approve more article ideas in Content OS (20 currently approved, need more in 2 weeks)
